title: Christmas Stocking with Letters and Plush Cuffs,-Red-,20-Inch Large Personalised Christmas Stockings,Christmas Socks for Christmas Tree Decorations, and Gifts for Adults/Children (A)
features: 【Personalized Letters, Soft & Exquisite】-You can choose English letters that match your child's name, making the gift full of heartfelt meaning. These Christmas stockings are crafted from high-quality materials, featuring soft plush cuffs and exquisite letter embroidery. They feel comfortable to the touch and are durable for long-term use

【Extra-Large Capacity】-The Christmas stocking measures up to 45cm in length and 24cm in opening width. Combined with highly stretchable materials and craftsmanship, it can hold plenty of gifts such as toys, candies, gift cards, and chocolates to give to your family
【Hanging Loop Design】-Equipped with a hanging loop, this stocking can be hung on mantels, Christmas trees, or other places as a decoration

【Customer Comes First】-Quality and customer satisfaction are our top priorities. We aim to provide you with high-quality products for a lasting experience. If you have any questions about the Christmas stocking, please feel free to contact us
【Delivery Notice】Delivery is not available to Northern Ireland, the Channel Islands, the Isle of Man, and other island regions.
description: Packaging: OPP bag Packaging dimensions: 25*20*1cm Product dimensions: 26*45cm Material: Cloth Delivery contents: 1 lettered Christmas stocking
